items.question: What documents can I upload?
items.answer: You can upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT files. The system is optimized for legal contracts, agreements, and other structured legal documents.

items.question: Is my data private and secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use privacy-first processing and your documents are handled securely. Data is not stored permanently and processing happens in a secure environment.

items.question: Can Nyayasetu AI replace my lawyer?
items.answer: No. Nyayasetu AI provides informational analysis to help you understand contracts better, but it does not replace professional legal advice. Always consult a qualified advocate for important legal decisions.

items.question: How long does the analysis take?
items.answer: Most documents are analyzed within seconds. Complex contracts may take up to a minute. The average response time is around 35 seconds.

items.question: Do I need to create an account?
items.answer: No account is needed for your first scan. You can try the analysis immediately. For continued use and to save your history, you may want to sign up.

cta.title: Read legal language like a professional.
cta.subpoint: Data stays private and processing remains secure.
